title: Part 6 – Texte à trous : dîner annuel de l'entreprise
instructions: Lisez l'invitation et choisissez le mot ou le groupe de mots qui convient pour chaque numéro.
passage:
To: All Employees
From: Events Committee
Subject: Annual Company Dinner

We are excited to invite you to this year's annual company dinner, which {{1}} take place on Friday, July 17th, at the Grand Palace Hotel.

{{2}}, the evening will include a three-course meal, live music, and an awards ceremony to recognize outstanding employees.

Please RSVP by July 5th so that we can finalize the seating arrangements. {{3}}, let us know if you have any dietary restrictions.

We look forward to {{4}} you there for an evening of celebration.

questions.explanation: L'événement est à venir ("this year's... dinner"), on utilise le futur "will take place".
On ajoute des informations supplémentaires sur le déroulement de la soirée : "In addition".
On ajoute une seconde demande (les restrictions alimentaires) à la première (le RSVP) : "Also".
"Look forward to" est toujours suivi d'un gérondif : "to seeing you".
